_description: Labeled evaluation dataset for FreelanceReach BERT matching. Each entry has a proposal and a list of freelancer candidates with ground-truth relevance labels (1=relevant, 0=not relevant). Used to compute Precision@K, Recall@K, MRR, and NDCG.
